# Beudox HR - Technical Context for AI Assistants

## Architecture Overview

Beudox HR is a React TypeScript application built with Vite, using Supabase as the backend. The app follows a component-based architecture with role-based access control and multi-tenant support.

### Core Technologies
- **Frontend Framework**: React 18 with TypeScript
- **Build Tool**: Vite with SWC
- **Routing**: React Router v6 with protected routes
- **State Management**: TanStack Query for server state, React Context for auth
- **UI Library**: shadcn/ui built on Radix UI primitives
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS with custom design tokens
- **Forms**: React Hook Form with Zod validation
- **Rich Text**: TipTap editor
- **Charts**: Recharts
- **Backend**: Supabase (PostgreSQL + Auth + Storage + Edge Functions)

## Key Architectural Patterns

### Authentication & Authorization
- Supabase Auth handles user authentication
- Row Level Security (RLS) policies ensure data isolation
- Role-based access control with 5 roles: employee, hr_manager, finance_manager, team_lead, ceo
- Protected routes check permissions before rendering

### Data Flow
- TanStack Query manages server state with caching and optimistic updates
- Supabase client provides type-safe database operations
- Real-time subscriptions for live updates where needed

### Component Structure
- shadcn/ui components provide consistent design system
- Feature-based organization (components grouped by domain)
- Custom hooks encapsulate business logic
- TypeScript ensures type safety throughout

## Database Schema Highlights

### Core Tables
- `companies` - Multi-tenant isolation
- `employees` - User profiles with auth integration
- `roles` & `employee_roles` - Role-based permissions
- `evaluations` & `daily_evaluations` - Performance tracking
- `leave_requests` & `leave_balances` - Leave management
- `payroll_cycles` & `payslips` - Payroll processing
- `projects` & `project_assignments` - Project management
- `invoices` & `invoice_items` - Billing system
- `hr_policies` - Policy documents
- `loans` - Employee loan tracking

### Key Relationships
- Employees belong to companies
- Role-based access controls all operations
- Evaluations link employees with managers
- Projects connect employees and clients
- Leave balances track entitlements and usage

## Important Files & Their Purposes

### Entry Points
- `src/main.tsx` - React app initialization
- `src/App.tsx` - Main app component with routing
- `src/pages/Index.tsx` - Root page component

### Authentication
- `src/hooks/useAuth.tsx` - Auth context and session management
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Role-based route access logic
- `src/integrations/supabase/client.ts` - Supabase client configuration

### Core Components
- `src/components/layout/AppLayout.tsx` - Main app shell
- `src/components/layout/AppSidebar.tsx` - Navigation sidebar
- `src/components/layout/TopBar.tsx` - Top navigation bar
- `src/components/BeudoxLogo.tsx` - Logo component with variants

### Business Logic
- `src/lib/leave-utils.ts` - Leave calculation utilities
- `src/lib/format-date.ts` - Date formatting helpers
- `src/lib/notifications.ts` - Notification system
- `src/lib/role-access.ts` - Access control logic

### UI Components
- `src/components/ui/` - shadcn/ui component library
- `src/components/SearchableEmployeeSelect.tsx` - Employee selection component
- `src/components/evaluations/EvaluationTimeline.tsx` - Evaluation history display
- `src/components/hr-policies/RichTextEditor.tsx` - Rich text editing component

## Configuration Files
- `vite.config.ts` - Vite build configuration
- `tailwind.config.ts` - Tailwind CSS configuration
- `tsconfig.json` - TypeScript configuration
- `supabase/config.toml` - Supabase project configuration
- `package.json` - Dependencies and scripts

## Development Workflow

### Code Quality
- ESLint for code linting
- TypeScript for type checking
- Vitest for unit testing
- Playwright for E2E testing

### Build Process
- Vite handles fast development builds
- SWC provides fast TypeScript compilation
- Tailwind CSS processes utility classes
- Asset optimization for production

## Business Logic Patterns

### Employee Management
- CRUD operations for employee records
- Role assignment and permission management
- Profile management with avatar support

### Leave Management
- Balance tracking with different leave types
- Request workflow with approval process
- Calendar integration for date calculations

### Evaluation System
- Quarterly formal evaluations
- Daily feedback system
- Score-based assessments with comments
- Role-based visibility (managers see more details)

### Payroll Processing
- Automated payslip generation
- Tax calculations and deductions
- PDF generation for documents
- Financial reporting

### Project Management
- Project lifecycle management
- Team assignment and tracking
- Client relationship management
- Time tracking integration

## Security Considerations

- Supabase RLS ensures data access control
- Authentication required for all operations
- Role-based UI rendering prevents unauthorized actions
- Secure password reset flows
- API key protection in environment variables

## Performance Optimizations

- TanStack Query caching reduces API calls
- Lazy loading for route components
- Image optimization and CDN usage
- Database indexing on frequently queried fields
- Pagination for large datasets

## Deployment

- Built as static SPA deployable to any CDN
- Supabase handles backend scaling
- Environment-based configuration
- CI/CD ready with npm scripts
